items.title: Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence (2.8T param MoE)
items.core_innovation: 2.8T param open MoE with Kimi Delta Attention, 1M context
items.significance: First open 3T-class model rivaling closed frontier LLMs

items.title: Welcome Inkling by Thinking Machines
items.core_innovation: Open-weight model tops ARC-AGI 1 and 2 benchmarks
items.significance: Best open reasoning/generalization scores at low per-task cost

items.title: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 release
items.core_innovation: Most agentic mid-tier Claude yet, 63.2% SWE-bench Pro
items.significance: Strong cost/performance shift for agentic coding workloads

items.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed
items.core_innovation: 8B open embedding model ranks #1 on RTEB retrieval
items.significance: New SOTA open embedding for enterprise RAG/search

items.title: Where Should RL Post-Training Compute Go?
items.core_innovation: Studies fixed-budget tradeoffs: model size vs search vs feedback
items.significance: Actionable guidance for allocating scarce RL post-training compute

items.title: Adaptive Filtering of the KV Cache: Structural-Role Bias
items.core_innovation: Diagnoses attention-based KV eviction bias toward non-content tokens
items.significance: Improves long-context accuracy on structured/JSON-heavy inputs

items.title: ExTernD: Expanded-Rank Ternary Decomposition PTQ
items.core_innovation: Expanded-rank ternary factorization approaches near-lossless quant
items.significance: Pushes ternary LLM quantization accuracy toward full precision

items.title: PolyQ: Codesigned Quantization for Edge CPU LLM Inference
items.core_innovation: Compiler-aware per-channel mixed bit-width quantization for CPUs
items.significance: Enables efficient scalable on-device LLM inference on CPUs

items.title: ExaGEMM: CPU-Driven Low-Bit GEMM Framework
items.core_innovation: Associative in-register computing codesign for low-bit CPU GEMM
items.significance: Systematic exploration of CPU-native low-bit inference tradeoffs

items.title: Quantize with Confidence? Empirical Study of Quantization for Code Gen
items.core_innovation: Empirically evaluates 6 quant methods on code generation quality
items.significance: Practical guidance for local/on-device code model deployment

items.title: Perception-RFT: Reasoning-Free Alignment for Doc QA
items.core_innovation: Training-efficient alignment without verbose RL reasoning traces
items.significance: Cuts inference token cost while keeping visual grounding accuracy

items.title: LIFT: Reactive Force Injection for VLA Post-Training
items.core_innovation: Adds contact-force reactivity to pretrained vision-language-action policies
items.significance: Improves robot manipulation robustness in occluded/contact states
